title: Referrals
description: Share your link, earn credit when a referral converts.

steps.title: Your referral link
steps.description: Every signup through it is attributed to you.
steps.voiceScript: This is your referral link. Every signup through it is credited to you.
steps.captionText: This is your referral link. Every signup through it is credited to you.
steps.fallbackMessage: Your referral link: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Your conversions
steps.description: Credit is applied when a referral upgrades.
steps.voiceScript: Credit is applied when a referral upgrades to a paid plan.
steps.captionText: Credit is applied when a referral upgrades to a paid plan.
steps.fallbackMessage: Your conversions: not visible on this screen yet.
